title: A Leaf For Hand In Hand
content:
A leaf for hand in hand!
You natural persons old and young!
You on the Mississippi, and on all the branches and bayous of the
Mississippi!
You friendly boatmen and mechanics! You roughs!
You twain! And all processions moving along the streets!
I wish to infuse myself among you till I see it common for you to
walk hand in hand!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walt Whitman delivers a powerful performance in "A Leaf For Hand In Hand"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
